chapter_title.en: Signs preceding the reappearance of Imam Mahdi (a.s)

text: : ذكرنا القائم عليه السلام ومن مات من أصحابنا ينتظره، فقال لنا أبو عبد الله عليه السلام: إذا قام أتى المؤمن في قبره فيقال له: يا هذا !إنه قد ظهر صاحبك، فإن تشأ أن تلحق به فالحق، وإن تشأ أن تقيم في كرامة ربك فأقم.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 470 - Fadhl has narrated from Muhammad bin Ali from Ja’far bin Bashir from Khalid bin Amara from Mufaddal bin Umar that he said: “Once we were discussing the subject of Imam Qaim and those who died waiting for him from among us. Imam Sadiq (a.s) said: When the Qaim rises up, someone will come and announce in the grave of every believer: Your Imam has risen, if you want to join, you may do so. Otherwise you may continue to lie in the mercy of God.”
